# EasyOptimizer-V study notice

The browser-side YTD inspector was implemented from the public RSC7/YTD layout
and tested against the behavior documented by
[EasyOptimizer-V](https://github.com/LN-Development/EasyOptimizer-V).

No EasyOptimizer-V source code or binary is bundled in this repository at this
stage. EasyOptimizer-V itself is distributed under GNU GPL v3. A future direct
port of its encoder to WebAssembly must retain the GPL license, attribution and
corresponding-source obligations.
